summary: Tested Verityn UI redesign with Flipboard/Inshorts style. All requested features verified: intro slides (3 screens), GDPR as checkbox (not modal), Terms popup, Flipboard-style home (hero images, source badge, serif headlines, category pills), bookmark/share buttons. Fixed missing TabRefreshEvents import in foryou.tsx.

minor.issue: Some news sources (WashingtonPost) block image scraping - handled with fallback image

ui_bugs.issue: Missing TabRefreshEvents import causing ReferenceError - FIXED

action_items: Verify TabRefreshEvents fix is working after bundle rebuild (hard refresh may be needed)
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: foryou.tsx was using TabRefreshEvents without importing it
The Flipboard-style UI is well-implemented with hero images taking ~55% of card height
GDPR checkbox approach is cleaner than blocking modal - good UX decision
seed_data_creation: None - RSS feeds provide real-time news data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: 1) Intro slides with 3 screens, Skip/Next buttons work, 2) Category selection with GDPR checkbox at bottom, 3) Terms & Privacy Policy popup opens correctly, 4) Feature overlay shows on first home visit, 5) Flipboard-style home with hero images, source badges, serif headlines, category pills, 6) Bookmark and Share buttons visible on cards. Fixed TabRefreshEvents missing import in foryou.tsx.

verified_features.intro_slides: Working - 3 slides with swipe, Skip button, Next/Get Started buttons
verified_features.gdpr_checkbox: Working - Checkbox at bottom of category selection (not blocking modal)
verified_features.terms_popup: Working - Opens when clicking 'Terms & Privacy Policy' link
verified_features.feature_overlay: Working - Shows on first home visit with 4 feature tips

flipboard_style_ui.hero_images: Working - Full-bleed images taking ~55% of card
flipboard_style_ui.category_pills: Working - My Feed, Business, Politics, Technology tabs
flipboard_style_ui.bookmark_share_buttons: Working - Visible in top-right of card

rca_of_issue.issue: ReferenceError: TabRefreshEvents is not defined in foryou.tsx
rca_of_issue.root_cause: Missing import statement for TabRefreshEvents from '../../src/utils/tabRefresh'
rca_of_issue.fix_applied: Added import { TabRefreshEvents } from '../../src/utils/tabRefresh'; to foryou.tsx
reproduction_steps: Error appears in console and renders error boundary
